$comment: Expected /drive-change Phase 7 unified report for the tiny-token-leak fixture. Tier-3 invokes the orchestrator end-to-end and parses the prose-shaped report (Mode / Slices / Specialists / Findings). Tolerant: severity_in arrays, summary regex patterns, count ranges. mode + expected_specialists_run are the orchestration-correctness signals; the per-finding checks ensure routing landed in the right reviewer's lane.
